checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export localStorage.jones_fastlane_save to disk. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Resume Persona A from the Week 2 summary/checkpoint in `phase11-safe-grinder`, complete exactly one authoritative Week 3 slice, write `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-03.md`, and export a durable checkpoint immediately after the week closes while checking whether `Ad Fatigue` still causes visible-summary sanity drift.

last_run.summary: Persona A resumed from the Week 1 checkpoint, accepted `Network Stimulus Drop`, bought the safe `Broken Auto-Chef` food option, worked one `Sanitation-T3` shift, closed Week 2 at ₡88 / Debt ₡0 / Hunger 20% / Sanity 28 with `Ad Fatigue` active, and exported the new authoritative checkpoint to docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/checkpoints/persona_a/week-02-save.json.
